Who I Am

My Story

Turning Ideas into
Digital Reality

I'm Raja Babu Rai — a Computer Science Engineering student with a deep passion for crafting beautiful, fast, and meaningful web experiences.

My journey started with curiosity about how websites work, and evolved into a pursuit of mastering the craft of frontend development. I believe great design is invisible — users shouldn't notice the interface, they should just feel it working.

I'm currently seeking internship opportunities and freelance projects where I can contribute real value while continuing to grow.

What I Offer

My Services

01

Web Development

Building fast, responsive, and SEO-friendly websites from scratch. Clean semantic HTML, efficient CSS, and smooth JavaScript interactions.

02

UI / UX Design

Designing interfaces that feel natural and intuitive. Focused on user flows, visual hierarchy, and creating experiences people enjoy using.

03

Landing Pages

Converting visitors into clients. High-performance landing pages with compelling layouts, animations, and clear calls to action.

04

Python Scripting

Automating repetitive tasks, building small tools, and writing clean Python scripts that save time and increase productivity.

05

Responsive Design

Every project I build works flawlessly on all screen sizes — from mobile phones to large desktop monitors. No compromises.

06

Animations & Motion

Bringing interfaces to life with purposeful animations using GSAP and CSS. Motion that enhances the experience, not distracts from it.
